query: I want this repository to use our team's shared agent skills at acme/agent-skills. How do I set that up?

What's the precedence between SKILLRIG_ORIGIN and the project config file?
How do I set a personal default skills origin used across all my repos?

Our skills library is configured for this repo — how do I vendor the terraform-plan-review skill into it?

I re-ran skillrig add and it says 'refusing to overwrite' — how do I force it to take the origin's version?
someone changed .agents/skills/terraform-plan-review locally and now I want to restore the original from our library
How do I add a CI check that the skills committed in our repo haven't been modified from what was approved?
skillrig verify failed in CI and exited 2 — what does that mean and which skills are the problem?
make sure nobody secretly edited one of our agent skills before we merge
verify is reporting one of my skills as 'orphan' and another as 'dirty' — what do those mean and how do I fix them?
does skillrig verify fail if the CLI a skill needs (like terraform) isn't installed on the runner?
verify the SHA-256 checksum of this tarball I downloaded matches the release page
how do I check that my last git commit is GPG-signed and verified on GitHub?

write a table-driven unit test for a Go function that parses OWNER/REPO references

help me author a brand-new SKILL.md from scratch for a Claude Code skill I'm writing
find me a skill that can help write better git commit messages
